title: ListVersionsRequestPayload
description: Request payload for listing xRegistry Versions, optionally filtered by Group type, Group, Resource type, Resource, and/or label.

groupType.description: Group type. Lists Versions across all Group types if not specified.

groupId.description: Group identifier. Uses the default Group if not specified. Ignored if allGroups is true.

allGroups.description: If true, lists Versions across all Groups (groupId is ignored). If false or unspecified, lists within the Group specified by groupId, or the default Group if groupId is unspecified.

resourceType.description: Resource type. Lists Versions across all Resource types if not specified.

resourceId.description: Resource identifier. Lists Versions across all Resources if not specified.

label.description: If specified, only Versions with this label are listed.
